title: Cricket’s Legend Comes Into View
description: On pages 17, 18, this part focuses on toward the knock up stream. The search for sky island becomes more concrete as the crew learns about unusual currents, salvage rivals, and the legends around Jaya.
scene: This scene belongs to the Toward the Knock Up Stream sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji, Zoro.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If so... May we observe your work?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Sure, sure! Watch all you want!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Alright! Let's just watch for now...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Did the sea monsters get em!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WHAT!? So there's someone down there...!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: There's someone down there! So be careful!

summary: The search for sky island becomes more concrete as the crew learns about unusual currents, salvage rivals, and the legends around Jaya.
